summary: Spec/Filter Group Isolation Feature - All backend tests PASSED (13/13). Frontend ManageOptionsModal verified working with group toggle badges visible. Feature allows specs/filters to be scoped to specific product groups to prevent bleeding across groups.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: PATCH /api/specifications/types/{type_id}/toggle-group - adds/removes product groups from spec types
VERIFIED: PATCH /api/filters/types/{filter_id}/toggle-group - adds/removes auto_populate_groups from filter types
VERIFIED: POST /api/specifications/types/{type_id}/values - accepts product_groups array and stores it on new values
VERIFIED: POST /api/filters/types/{filter_slug}/add-value - accepts product_groups array and stores it on new values
VERIFIED: GET /api/specifications/types - returns product_groups field for each spec type
VERIFIED: GET /api/filters/types - returns auto_populate_groups field for each filter type
VERIFIED: ManageOptionsModal opens from Bulk Category Editor via 'Manage Options' button
VERIFIED: Product group selector shows All Groups, Underfloor Heating, Tiles, Flooring, Materials, Tools, Accessories
VERIFIED: Specifications tab shows group toggle badges when viewing 'All Groups'
VERIFIED: Filters tab shows group toggle badges when viewing 'All Groups'
VERIFIED: Group toggle badges show 'unscoped — visible in all groups' for legacy data with empty product_groups
VERIFIED: handleAddSpecValue() passes product_groups=[selectedGroup] when viewing specific group
VERIFIED: handleAddFilterValue() passes product_groups=[selectedGroup] when viewing specific group
VERIFIED: getFilteredSpecifications() filters by product_groups on spec types
VERIFIED: getFilteredFilters() filters by auto_populate_groups on filter types
context_for_next_testing_agent: Spec/Filter Group Isolation feature fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs for toggle-group on both specs and filters work correctly. Frontend ManageOptionsModal shows group toggle badges when viewing 'All Groups' and hides them when viewing a specific group. Values created while viewing a specific group are auto-scoped to that group. Legacy data (empty product_groups/auto_populate_groups) shows as 'unscoped — visible in all groups'. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_spec_filter_group_isolation.py
